name: Foreign Institutional Investors (India Steel Sector)
description: Aggregate representation of foreign institutional investors with positions in Indian steel equities. Sophisticated analysis with high information access but subject to sentiment contagion.
objectives: Generate alpha through sector rotation based on trade policy and commodity cycle analysis
Minimize drawdown risk during geopolitical and trade shock events
Maintain liquidity to meet redemption requests without fire-sale losses
Outperform MSCI India Materials index benchmark by 200+ basis points annually
constraints: SEBI regulations limit single-stock concentration above 10% of AUM
Redemption pressure during market stress forces liquidation at disadvantageous prices
Currency hedging costs reduce net returns on INR-denominated holdings
Quarterly reporting requirements create short-term performance pressure
